title: Fear Free Certified
text: Trained to read behavioral signals, reduce stress, and never force what isn't ready.

title: Verified every visit
text: GPS check-in, timestamps, photo report card — sent before you even ask.

title: Enrichment over mileage
text: A tired dog isn't always a fulfilled dog. Mental challenge matters as much as miles.

title: One handler, every time
text: Your dog knows who's coming. Consistency builds trust — for them and for you.
